title: Origins: Moth Fae
description: A mystical moth-themed Origin for the Origins mod. A tiny, luminous fae of the night, with moth-like wings and a heart attuned to growth and light.
body:
<iframe width="560" height="315" src="https://www.youtube-nocookie.com/embed/jXyXMeEdPys" title="YouTube video player" frameborder="0" allow="accelerometer; autoplay; clipboard-write; encrypted-media; gyroscope; picture-in-picture; web-share" allowfullscreen></iframe>

**This data pack is designed for the Origins mod and requires Apugli. While Pehkui is not mandatory, it is highly recommended.**

[This Origin was suggested by **Desticade** on Discord. If you would like to suggest your own data pack, you can do so over on my Discord server as well.](https://discord.gg/b8jJUQ29Wg)

**Moth Fae:** A tiny, luminous fae of the night, with moth-like wings and a heart attuned to growth and light. Drawn to the brightest glow, they flutter through fields, nurturing life with their gentle touch.

Impact: 🟡🟡

**🟩 Spell of Ascension [Primary]:** Channel the arcane power of your wand to lift creatures into the air.

**🟢 Gift of Wings:** Spread your ethereal wings and soar through the skies with precise control.

**🟢 Lunar Blessing:** Under the moon’s gentle light, your vitality is enhanced, and your hunger replenishes naturally.

**🟢 Spell of Reach:** When wielding your wand in your off-hand, your magic grants you the ability to reach distant objects or targets.

**🟢 Spell of Shadows:** Your presence becomes faint, rendering you almost invisible to creatures of ill intent.

**🟢 Verdant Touch:** With a wave of your hand, plants spring to life at the expense of your own sustenance.

**🟢 Wand of Moonlight:** You are born into the world with your enchanted wand, a companion you must safeguard for your journey.

**🟡 Fae-Sized:** Your stature is… let’s say, adorably compact, standing at a mere one-eighth of average height.

**🟡 Friend Shaped:** You possess a peculiar charm that allows you to ride atop the heads of your allies.

**🔴 Insectoid:** Weapons enchanted with Bane of Arthropods strike you with devastating force.

**🔴 Pyrophobia:** As a moth-like fae, your delicate form is highly vulnerable to fire’s deadly embrace.

[If you have any questions, concerns, or bugs you would like to report, my Discord server is a great place for doing so.](https://discord.gg/b8jJUQ29Wg)
